{{- /* Page-derived series index, recomputed every build. Layout selected by site.Params.seriesIndex.style: `cards` (default) | `table` | `none`. Series is inferred from the host page's `series` param; a positional arg overrides: {{< series-index "operating" >}}. `series` must be a LIST — Hextra's opengraph partial ranges over it, so a scalar is a hard build error. Posts are selected by series, weight-sorted, host page self-excluded. `cards` colours each card by the post's `layer` when the blog opts in (data/layer_palette.yaml + a `layer:` frontmatter); otherwise cards are neutral. */ -}} {{- $style := "cards" -}} {{- with site.Params.seriesIndex }}{{- with .style }}{{- $style = . -}}{{- end }}{{- end -}} {{- $series := "" -}} {{- if .Params -}}{{- $series = .Get 0 -}}{{- else -}}{{- $series = index .Page.Params.series 0 -}}{{- end -}} {{- $posts := (where site.Pages "Params.series" "intersect" (slice $series)).ByWeight -}} {{- $rows := slice -}} {{- range $posts -}} {{- if ne .RelPermalink $.Page.RelPermalink -}}{{- $rows = $rows | append . -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- if eq $style "none" -}} {{- else if eq $style "table" -}} {{- if $rows -}} {{- range $rows }} {{- $num := "" -}}{{- with (findRE `^[0-9]+` .File.ContentBaseName) -}}{{- $num = index . 0 -}}{{- end }} {{- end }}
#PostTakeaway
{{ $num }}{{ .LinkTitle }}{{ .Params.summary }}
{{- else -}}

No posts yet.

{{- end -}} {{- else -}} {{- /* cards (default): a papers-roadmap-style vertical timeline; colour-coded by the post's `layer` when the blog ships data/layer_palette.yaml, else neutral. */ -}} {{- $palette := false -}} {{- with site.Data.layer_palette }}{{- $palette = .layers -}}{{- end -}} {{- if $rows -}}
{{- range $rows }} {{- $num := "" -}}{{- with (findRE `^[0-9]+` .File.ContentBaseName) -}}{{- $num = index . 0 -}}{{- end -}} {{- $layer := .Params.layer | default "" -}} {{- $entry := false -}}{{- with $palette }}{{- $entry = index . $layer -}}{{- end -}} {{- $tags := .Params.tags -}}
{{ $num }}{{ .LinkTitle }}
{{- with .Params.summary }}
{{ . }}
{{ end -}} {{- if or $entry $tags }}
{{- with $entry }}{{ .name }}{{ end -}} {{- with $tags }}{{ range . }}{{ . }}{{ end }}{{ end -}}
{{ end -}}
{{- end }}
{{- else -}}

No posts yet.

{{- end -}} {{- end -}}
